meta.description: An alternative option considered in a decision or ADR.

sqlSchema:
CREATE TABLE "obj_acbace94_dee8_43da_854d_bfc1a656d1e6" (
    item_id UUID NOT NULL,
    "option" TEXT,
    "tradeoffs" TEXT,
    CONSTRAINT "pk_obj_acbace94_dee8_43da_854d_bfc1a656d1e6" PRIMARY KEY (item_id),
    CONSTRAINT "fk_acbace94dee843da_item" FOREIGN KEY (item_id) REFERENCES items(id)
)
